name: Meow Agent Style
summary: Make the agent end every natural-language sentence in final replies with `喵`.

summaryI18n.zh: 让 agent 的最终可见回复每句话都以「喵」结尾。
summaryI18n.en: Make the agent end every natural-language sentence in final replies with `喵`.

author: r1n7aro
description: Meow Agent Style provides a small Locus Rule that can be enabled for an agent. The rule asks the agent to preserve the useful content of the answer while ending every natural-language sentence in final user-facing replies with `喵`.

descriptionI18n.zh: Meow Agent Style 提供一个小型 Locus Rule，可在 agent 的 Rule UI 中启用。启用后，agent 会保留回答内容，并让最终可见回复中的每个自然语言句子都以「喵」结尾。
descriptionI18n.en: Meow Agent Style provides a small Locus Rule that can be enabled for an agent. It preserves useful answer content while ending every natural-language sentence in final user-facing replies with `喵`.
